## Problem

What print or PDF problem does this change address?

## Approach

Explain the implementation and any color-management tradeoffs.

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests were added or updated.
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`, `ruff check .`, `mypy src tests`, and `pytest --cov` pass.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog reflect user-visible behavior.
- [ ] No restricted ICC profile, customer artwork, secret, or generated output is committed.
- [ ] Claims distinguish automated checks from physical proof or formal PDF/X validation.
